How to read this page · The Gantt strip above shows every SS client team's upcoming window at a glance. Each team's collapsed card below shows the roster and the game they're actively shipping or in QA on right now. Click a card to expand and see the team's upcoming roadmap. "Other assignees" lists the GD / Art / BEE working alongside the client team on that game.

Pipeline dependencies
⬆ Depends on
  • GD (UI flow comes from the GDD)
  • BEE (FEE wires up the server contract)
  • Art (final art assets get plugged into FEE)
⬇ Blocks
  • QA (FEE ships into QA-ready)
  • Launch (FEE done is a hard gate for launch)
